visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a close-up of a young woman with long brown hair wearing a pinkish-tan top, eating a mouthful of orange-red spicy porridge from a large spoon. A long strand of melted cheese stretches from the spoon to her mouth. (2) The camera cuts to a top-down view of the porridge in a black electric pot, featuring chunks of noodles and dark green seaweed flakes. A spoon lifts a portion, showing the cheesy texture. (3) The woman is now seen in a medium shot indoors, holding a black package of instant noodles. She pours dry noodles into the pot of boiling water. (4) In a series of close-up shots, she uses scissors to cut the noodles, adds a bowl of white rice, pours in a dark red sauce from a bottle, adds water, sprinkles black pepper from a small yellow container, and spreads a large amount of shredded yellow and white cheese over the mixture. (5) She pours sesame oil from a clear bottle with a yellow cap and then tears pieces of seaweed from a green and yellow packet over the cooked porridge. (6) The final dish is shown with the seaweed and sesame seeds on top. She takes a large bite, exhibiting a dramatic cheese pull, while looking directly at the camera with an expressive, satisfied face. (7) She then holds up different packets of seaweed, pointing to them and speaking to the camera, with several bags of the product visible on the table behind her.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Variety]: POV. [Slogan]: 當韓國人感冒時吃的起司粥🔥. (2) [Variety]: 要用「火辣雞麵」做. (3) [Variety]: 其實呢. (4) [Variety]: 打碎後！ (5) [Variety]: 煮也可以. (6) [Variety]: 或像我煮完後切也可以. (7) [Variety]: 1. 加飯一起拌一拌. (8) [Variety]: 我自己超愛吃辣. (9) [Variety]: 所以再加了一包火辣雞醬🔥. (10) [Variety]: 記得要加大概 150ml 水. (11) [Variety]: 讓湯汁剛好濕潤. (12) [Variety]: 2. 灑上一點韓國黑胡椒粉. (13) [Logo]: Romellet. (14) [Variety]: 起司🧀️. (15) [Variety]: 3. 加披薩起司！！！ (16) [Variety]: 4. 關火後加一點香油. (17) [Variety]: 5. 再把韓國洋蔥海苔撕碎灑上去. (18) [Variety]: 完成. (19) [Variety]: + 洋蔥海苔. (20) [Variety]: 起司的濃郁口感真的大爆發🤤. (21) [Variety]: （金甲好吃...）. (22) [Variety]: 熱呼呼、鹹香剛剛好. (23) [Variety]: 吃完身體還會熱熱的. (24) [Variety]: 根本就是補身料理！！！🔥. (25) [Variety]: 原味海苔也很好吃. (26) [Variety]: 這吃法其實從我小時候流行. (27) [Variety]: 爸爸也有煮給我 La juk. (28) [Variety]: 韓文라죽. (29) [Variety]: 重點：要用韓國食材🇰🇷. (30) [Variety]: 為什麼呢？ (31) [Variety]: 才能吃到當地的口味！ (32) [Variety]: 這是有瑕超級愛吃的. (33) [Variety]: 韓國海苔！！！ (34) [Variety]: 🇰🇷韓國順伊奶奶海苔. [Variety]: 洋蔥口味. (35) [Variety]: 超級. (36) [Variety]: 好吃！ (37) [Slogan]: 韓國海苔最低價團購. [Slogan]: 08/23 ~ 08/27. (38) [Variety]: 問題是. (39) [Variety]: 順伊奶奶海苔. (40) [Variety]: 本來非常有名... (41) [Variety]: 有時候大賣場也缺貨. (42) [Variety]: 洋蔥口味最有人氣，最難搶貨！ (43) [Variety]: 一定要準時下單. (44) [Variety]: 詳細資訊在文案裡面. [Slogan]: 08/23 中午 12:00 要在限動開放連結. (45) [Variety]: 找不到臉的話，留言「洋蔥海苔」. [Slogan]: 08/23 中午 12:00 要在限動開放連結.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator consistently appearing throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long, dark brown hair. She wears a light pink/peach long-sleeved shirt and, in some segments, a black and white checkered dress.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A typical home interior with white doors and light-colored walls. A dining table holds an electric cooking pot, various food packages, and seaweed containers.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy electronic pop music with a female vocal repeating 'yummy' starts immediately. (2) A sharp 'whoosh' sound effect accompanies the first visual cut. (3) The female narrator begins speaking in a clear, high-pitched, and enthusiastic tone in Mandarin Chinese. (4) Distinct plastic rustling and crinkling sounds are heard as the noodles and seaweed packets are handled. (5) A percussive 'click' or 'snip' sound is heard when the scissors cut the noodles. (6) A soft 'glug' sound occurs during the pouring of sauce and sesame oil. (7) 'Ding' sound effects punctuate the numbering of steps (1, 2, 3, etc.). (8) The narrator's speech rate increases during the explanation of the seaweed brand, maintaining high arousal. (9) The music continues throughout with a steady, upbeat drum pattern and synth melody, blending with the constant vocal narration and occasional crisp sound effects.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Step-by-step Tutorial -> Tasting/Reaction -> Product Promotion -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to teach viewers how to make a specific 'Korean-style cheesy spicy porridge' using Buldak ramen while simultaneously promoting a specific brand of Korean seaweed (Grandmother's Sincerity) through a limited-time group buying event.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator specifically highlights the seaweed brand, shows the packaging multiple times, mentions a group buy link, and provides specific dates for the sale.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a high-density editing style typical of social media marketing, combining ASMR-like cooking sounds with high-energy narration to maintain engagement.
